concerns.text: T070 incorrectly describes evaluating 'inconsistency‑detection component' on real-world validation set when FR-031b and SC-031b explicitly require evaluating 'extraction accuracy component' — this is a fundamental scope mismatch that would validate the wrong metric. Task must be rewritten to match spec.

T035-T038 (FR-001 through FR-004 Verification tasks) are vague about verification method — they say 'verification of T018/T020/T023/T025' but don't specify what test or check to run. Each must name the concrete verification artifact (e.g., 'run tests/integration/test_extractor_accuracy.py').

T096/T097 record checksums to `data/checksums.txt` while T076/T077 (in spec.md) record to `output/checksums.txt` — duplicate checksum tasks with ambiguous authoritative location. Must consolidate to single location per Constitution Principle III.

T099 implements governance invalidation mechanism but does not include explicit task to update `state/projects/PROJ-492-evaluating-the-statistical-validity-of-p.yaml updated_at timestamp` as required by Constitution Principle V. Add verification step for state YAML update.

T069 describes 'Create real-world validation annotation task' requiring human annotators — this is not executable by an implementer (LLM or human developer) deterministically. Must be split into: (a) task to source URLs, (b) task to create annotation protocol, (c) manual annotation process documented separately.
